summary: Retest of iteration_18 bug fix 1 (Specials PDP autoselect race) PASSED on both desktop (1280x800) and mobile (390x844). All 4 regression bullets also PASSED. Bug fix (moving specials autoselect into load .then handler and removing separate isSpecial useEffect in ProductDetail.jsx) is verified. No frontend/backend regressions detected.

bug_fix_1_specials_pdp_desktop_1280x800.artwork_grid: PRESENT (count=1) — PASS (was the failing check in iteration_18)

regression_design_mobile_order.verdict: Order Product → Canvas → Left aside → Sizes — PASS

regression_mobile_menu_dark_text_on_home.sample_item_colors: all rgb(10, 10, 10) across nav-mobile-group-shop and nav-mobile-link-* items
regression_mobile_menu_dark_text_on_home.verdict: Dark text (rgb(10,10,10)) on white background — PASS

critical_code_review_comments: ProductDetail.jsx load useEffect now atomically sets selectedPlacements based on p.specials_eligible inside the same .then() handler — no race conditions observed.

Minor React hydration warning observed on /design about <span> inside <option> from a static instrumentation attribute wrapper. Not a functional bug (order is still correct); can be safely ignored unless SSR is added.
test_credentials: Not required for these UI checks; admin credentials not used.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 confirms fix from iteration 18 for Specials PDP autoselect. artwork-grid is present on /product/personalised-tee on both desktop and mobile. All 4 regressions (non-specials PDP, workforce tile expansion, design mobile ordering, mobile menu dark-on-white) intact. Correct testids for further tests: workforce-add-{pid}/workforce-expanded-{pid}/workforce-description-{pid}/workforce-sizes-{pid}; designer-product-aside/designer-canvas-main/designer-left-aside/designer-right-aside; nav-mobile-open/nav-mobile-overlay/nav-mobile-close.
rca of the issue: N/A — bug fix already applied by main agent (iteration 18). Verified: ProductDetail.jsx lines 47-56 now sets selectedPlacements = p?.specials_eligible ? ['left-breast'] : [] within the same Promise.all().then() that populates product state, eliminating the useEffect race that previously wiped the autoselect and hid the upload widget.
